Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Remove fallen leaves, use resistant varieties, prune for air circulation
Apple___Apple_scab.description_en: Fungal infection causing olive-green to brown velvety spots on leaves
Apple___Apple_scab.description_hi: पत्तियों पर हरे-भूरे मखमली धब्बे वाला फफूंद संक्रमण

Apple___Black_rot.organic: Copper hydroxide spray + removal of mummified fruits
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Remove dead wood, mummified fruits, maintain orchard sanitation
Apple___Black_rot.description_en: Fungal disease causing black circular lesions on fruit and leaf spots
Apple___Black_rot.description_hi: फलों पर काले गोल घाव और पत्ती धब्बे वाला फफूंद रोग

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.organic: Remove nearby juniper/cedar trees, sulfur spray
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Plant resistant varieties, remove juniper hosts within 2 miles
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.description_en: Rust fungus causing bright orange spots on apple leaves
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.description_hi: सेब की पत्तियों पर चमकीले नारंगी धब्बे वाला जंग फफूंद

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.organic: Crop rotation with non-host crops, Trichoderma application
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.prevention: Avoid continuous corn planting, use resistant hybrids, till crop residue
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.description_en: Rectangular gray lesions between leaf veins of corn
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.description_hi: मक्का की पत्ती नसों के बीच आयताकार धूसर घाव

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.organic: Neem oil spray, use tolerant varieties
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.prevention: Plant early, use rust-resistant hybrids, avoid late planting
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.description_en: Reddish-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces of corn
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.description_hi: मक्का की पत्तियों के दोनों ओर लाल-भूरे दाने

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Use resistant hybrids, deep plowing to bury residue
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.description_en: Long elliptical gray-green lesions on corn leaves
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.description_hi: मक्का की पत्तियों पर लंबे अंडाकार धूसर-हरे घाव

Grape___Black_rot.organic: Remove mummified berries, copper spray before bloom
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Good canopy management, remove infected parts, proper spacing
Grape___Black_rot.description_en: Brown circular spots on leaves, black shriveled berries
Grape___Black_rot.description_hi: पत्तियों पर भूरे गोल धब्बे, काली सिकुड़ी हुई बेरियाँ

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).chemical: No effective chemical — manage with surgery and nutrition
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).organic: Trunk surgery to remove infected wood, apply wound paste
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).prevention: Avoid pruning in wet weather, protect pruning wounds
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).description_en: Tiger stripe pattern on leaves, dark spots on berries
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).description_hi: पत्तियों पर बाघ की धारी पैटर्न, बेरियों पर काले धब्बे

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.organic: Bordeaux mixture spray, remove fallen leaves
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.prevention: Proper vine training, avoid overcrowding, good drainage
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.description_en: Irregular brown spots with yellow halo on grape leaves
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.description_hi: अंगूर की पत्तियों पर पीले किनारे वाले अनियमित भूरे धब्बे

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).chemical: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL for psyllid vector control
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).organic: Remove infected trees, control Asian citrus psyllid with neem
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Use disease-free nursery stock, manage psyllid vector aggressively
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description_en: Asymmetric yellowing of leaves, lopsided bitter fruits
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description_hi: पत्तियों का असमान पीलापन, टेढ़े कड़वे फल

Peach___Bacterial_spot.organic: Copper hydroxide spray before rainy season
Peach___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Avoid overhead irrigation, plant resistant varieties
Peach___Bacterial_spot.description_en: Small dark water-soaked spots on peach leaves
Peach___Bacterial_spot.description_hi: आड़ू की पत्तियों पर छोटे गहरे पानीदार धब्बे

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds, avoid working in wet fields, crop rotation
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.description_en: Small dark raised spots on pepper leaves and fruits
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.description_hi: मिर्च की पत्तियों और फलों पर छोटे गहरे उभरे धब्बे

Potato___Early_blight.organic: Trichoderma harzianum application, neem cake in soil
Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops, remove infected debris
Potato___Early_blight.description_en: Concentric ring pattern (target spots) on lower potato leaves
Potato___Early_blight.description_hi: आलू की निचली पत्तियों पर गोल छल्ले का पैटर्न (लक्ष्य धब्बे)

Potato___Late_blight.organic: Bordeaux mixture 1%, remove infected plants immediately
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Avoid excess irrigation, use certified seed tubers, destroy volunteer plants
Potato___Late_blight.description_en: Water-soaked dark lesions with white mold on leaf underside
Potato___Late_blight.description_hi: पत्ती के नीचे सफेद फफूंद के साथ पानीदार गहरे घाव

Squash___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Good air circulation, avoid overhead watering, resistant varieties
Squash___Powdery_mildew.description_en: White powdery coating on upper leaf surfaces
Squash___Powdery_mildew.description_hi: पत्तियों की ऊपरी सतह पर सफेद चूर्णी परत

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.organic: Remove infected leaves, mulching, Trichoderma application
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Good air circulation, drip irrigation, avoid overhead watering
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.description_en: Irregular purple-red spots that enlarge and cause leaf edges to curl
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.description_hi: अनियमित बैंगनी-लाल धब्बे जो बढ़कर पत्ती किनारों को मोड़ते हैं

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds, crop rotation, avoid overhead irrigation
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description_en: Small dark water-soaked spots on tomato leaves and fruits
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description_hi: टमाटर की पत्तियों और फलों पर छोटे गहरे पानीदार धब्बे

Tomato___Early_blight.prevention: Crop rotation, remove lower infected leaves, proper staking
Tomato___Early_blight.description_en: Concentric ring pattern on older tomato leaves (target spots)
Tomato___Early_blight.description_hi: टमाटर की पुरानी पत्तियों पर गोल छल्ले का पैटर्न

Tomato___Late_blight.prevention: Avoid waterlogging, use resistant varieties, spray preventively in rainy season
Tomato___Late_blight.description_en: Large irregular water-soaked lesions with white mold underneath
Tomato___Late_blight.description_hi: नीचे सफेद फफूंद के साथ बड़े अनियमित पानीदार घाव

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.organic: Improve ventilation, reduce humidity, Trichoderma spray
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.prevention: Proper spacing, ventilation in greenhouses, avoid leaf wetness
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.description_en: Yellow spots on upper leaf, olive-green mold underneath
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.description_hi: ऊपर पीले धब्बे, नीचे जैतून-हरी फफूंद

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.organic: Copper spray, remove lower infected leaves, mulching
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.prevention: Crop rotation, remove debris, avoid overhead irrigation
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.description_en: Small circular spots with gray centers and dark borders on lower leaves
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.description_hi: निचली पत्तियों पर धूसर केंद्र और गहरे किनारों वाले छोटे गोल धब्बे

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.organic: Neem oil spray, release predatory mites (Phytoseiulus)
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.prevention: Avoid dusty conditions, maintain humidity, intercrop with coriander
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.description_en: Tiny yellow dots on leaves, fine webbing on leaf underside
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.description_hi: पत्तियों पर छोटे पीले बिंदु, नीचे महीन जाले

Tomato___Target_Spot.organic: Remove infected leaves, improve air circulation
Tomato___Target_Spot.prevention: Proper spacing, staking, remove lower leaves, crop rotation
Tomato___Target_Spot.description_en: Concentric ring spots on tomato leaves, stems and fruits
Tomato___Target_Spot.description_hi: टमाटर की पत्तियों, तनों और फलों पर गोल छल्ले वाले धब्बे

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.chemical: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL @ 0.3ml/L for whitefly vector control
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.organic: Yellow sticky traps, neem oil spray for whitefly control
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.prevention: Use virus-resistant varieties, control whitefly population, remove infected plants
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.description_en: Upward curling of leaves, stunted growth, yellow leaf margins
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.description_hi: पत्तियों का ऊपर की ओर मुड़ना, बौना विकास, पीले पत्ती किनारे

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.chemical: No chemical cure — control through sanitation
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.organic: Remove infected plants, milk spray (10%) as preventive
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.prevention: Use virus-free seeds, sanitize tools, wash hands with milk before handling
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.description_en: Mosaic pattern of light/dark green on leaves, distorted growth
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.description_hi: पत्तियों पर हल्के/गहरे हरे का मोजेक पैटर्न, विकृत विकास

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Good air circulation, avoid overcrowding, prune properly
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.description_en: White powdery fungal growth on cherry leaves
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.description_hi: चेरी की पत्तियों पर सफेद चूर्णी फफूंद
